evals.name: composition-avoids-ijpl-apis
evals.prompt: I am building a Jewel composable for an IntelliJ plugin. Is it okay for the composable to call Registry.get() and ProjectManager.getInstance() during composition if I wrap it in SwingBridgeTheme?
evals.expected_output: Guidance that Jewel/Compose composition should not directly or indirectly access IntelliJ Platform APIs; platform work belongs in a presenter/controller boundary or a tiny injected fakeable collaborator when unavoidable.
expectations: Says not to access IntelliJ Platform APIs directly or indirectly inside composition.
Allows an injected fakeable collaborator only when access is unavoidable.
Mentions threading or Compose stability implications of platform APIs.
Does not imply SwingBridgeTheme makes platform API access in composition safe.
